  "root_cause_analysis": "The migration was successful with no major issues. The changes were primarily related to updating the Java version from 17 to 21 and replacing Paths.get with Path.of for better compatibility.",
  "fixes_applied": "Updated Java version from 17 to 21, replaced Paths.get with Path.of, and removed unnecessary @Autowired annotations.",
  "final_result": "PASS",
  "files": [
    {
      "filename": "build.gradle",
      "before_code": "languageVersion = JavaLanguageVersion.of(17)",
      "after_code": "languageVersion = JavaLanguageVersion.of(21)",
      "explanation": "Updated Java version from 17 to 21 in build.gradle file."
    },
    {
      "filename": "pom.xml",
      "before_code": "<java.version>17</java.version>",
      "after_code": "<java.version>21</java.version>",
      "explanation": "Updated Java version from 17 to 21 in pom.xml file."
    },
    {
      "filename": "FileUploadController.java",
      "before_code": "@Autowired\npublic FileUploadController(StorageService storageService) {",
      "after_code": "public FileUploadController(StorageService storageService) {",
      "explanation": "Removed unnecessary @Autowired annotation in FileUploadController.java file."
    },
    {
      "filename": "FileSystemStorageService.java",
      "before_code": "this.rootLocation = Paths.get(properties.getLocation());",
      "after_code": "this.rootLocation = Path.of(properties.getLocation());",
      "explanation": "Replaced Paths.get with Path.of in FileSystemStorageService.java file for better compatibility."
    },
    {
      "filename": "FileUploadTests.java",
      "before_code": "given(this.storageService.loadAll()).willReturn(Stream.of(Paths.get(\"first.txt\"), Paths.get(\"second.txt\")));",
      "after_code": "given(this.storageService.loadAll()).willReturn(Stream.of(Path.of(\"first.txt\"), Path.of(\"second.txt\")));",
      "explanation": "Replaced Paths.get with Path.of in FileUploadTests.java file for better compatibility."
    },
    {
      "filename": "FileSystemStorageServiceTests.java",
      "before_code": "assertTrue(Files.exists(Paths.get(properties.getLocation()).resolve(Paths.get(fileName))));",
      "after_code": "assertTrue(Files.exists(Path.of(properties.getLocation()).resolve(Path.of(fileName))));",
      "explanation": "Replaced Paths.get with Path.of in FileSystemStorageServiceTests.java file for better compatibility."
    }
  ],
  "dependencies": [
    {
      "name": "Java",
      "old_version": "17",
      "new_version": "21",
      "reason": "Updated Java version to 21 for better compatibility and security."
    }
  ]
}
